name: Gamma Jack || The incredibles
description:
☢️|| Open Scenario

★*☆♪★*☆

Context: A bot with an open scenario so you can write your own story.

Will you be a corrupt super? Or a rookie looking to improve? You could even be a super from another dimension! Or just a normal person. The limit is your imagination.

WRITE YOUR OWN STORY!

You can follow the story from the movie or create a new one.

★*☆♪★*☆

TW: Possible sexism/misogyny from the 1940s. Gamma Jack being a stupid. Possible violence. Possible kills.
creator: Mysobsessionn
